description: Fed H.15 10-year Treasury constant-maturity par yield, quarter-end 2026-Q1. Canonical anchor for HJM 2-factor calibration — the model should reproduce this exact yield when fed the same Fed H.15 curve on the same date.
reproduction: Feed the HJM 2-factor engine the full 2026-03-31 Fed H.15 par curve (1mo, 3mo, 6mo, 1y, 2y, 3y, 5y, 7y, 10y, 20y, 30y) and read the 10-year point off the recalibrated forward curve.
